description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno City held explanatory meetings on emergency financial measures at various locations. The city explained the circumstances that led to financial difficulties and reviewed administrative operations and services.

【January 2026 sessions】(Completed)
• Saturday, January 17, 1:30 p.m.–3:30 p.m. / Hanno City Hall Annex Building
• Sunday, January 18, 9:30 a.m.–11:30 a.m. / Hanno City Hall Annex Building

【February 2026 sessions】(Completed)
Held at each district administrative center:
• Monday, February 9, 7 p.m.–9 p.m. / Kaji District Administrative Center
• Tuesday, February 10, 7 p.m.–9 p.m. / Seimei District Administrative Center
• Thursday, February 12, 7 p.m.–9 p.m. / Agano District Administrative Center
• Sunday, February 15, 9:30 a.m.–11:30 a.m. / Hanno Central District Administrative Center (sign language interpretation available)
• Tuesday, February 17, 7 p.m.–9 p.m. / Minamikomaone District Administrative Center
• Wednesday, February 18, 7 p.m.–9 p.m. / Haraichiba District Administrative Center
• Thursday, February 19, 7 p.m.–9 p.m. / Fujimi District Administrative Center (sign language interpretation available)
• Sunday, February 22, 9:30 a.m.–11:30 a.m. / Misugidai District Administrative Center
• Sunday, February 22, 2:30 p.m.–4:30 p.m. / Naguribe District Administrative Center
• Tuesday, February 24, 7 p.m.–9 p.m. / Futayanagi District Administrative Center
• Thursday, February 26, 7 p.m.–9 p.m. / Dainiki Ward District Administrative Center
• Friday, February 27, 7 p.m.–9 p.m. / Kajihigashi District Administrative Center
• Saturday, February 28, 9:30 a.m.–11:30 a.m. / Higashiagano District Administrative Center (sign language interpretation available)

Advance registration is not required. Please come directly to the venue. If participation is high, entry may be limited.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/zaiseika/kinkyuuzaiseitaisaku/12708.html
summary: ℹ️ Explanatory meetings on emergency financial measures
